name: Black Forest Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan over medium heat, cook potatoes, covered, in 2 inches boiling water until tender, about 12 minutes; drain.
2. Meanwhile, in a large bowl whisk together vinegar, oil, water and pepper. Mix in apples.
3. In a large nonstick skillet over medium heat, toss and brown sausage for 10 minutes. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
4. Add potatoes, sauerkraut, onions, parsley, and sausage to the apple mixture; toss gently.
5. Season with salt to taste.
